analyst_note: First substantive classification since the 2026-06-14 baseline (06-17/06-18 were carry-forward heartbeats). Three developments: (1) blow-off spike to an ATH of ~$225.64 on 06-16, then a ~18% pullback to ~$185 by 06-19 (intraday low ~$172; prev close $191.82) — still +37% over the $135 offer; (2) the Cursor/Anysphere acquisition was CONFIRMED 06-16 as a ~$60B ALL-STOCK deal, crystallizing a large Class-A stock obligation and explicitly exercising the stock-as-currency reflexive loop (press: the deal was 'paid for in a few hours of trading'); (3) an August 2026 float unlock is now reported as the concrete next lockup event (ahead of the ~Dec-2026 180-day insider expiry), plus a conditional 10% bonus tranche that releases only if SPCX closes >=$175.50 on >=5 of the 10 days into the Q2-earnings window. None of this meets an AMBER threshold: float is still ~fully locked (no fuel for a run), price remains well above offer (stock-settled obligations covered), and no counterparty node is stressed. Posture stays NOMINAL / all-GREEN, but this is no longer the 'fresh quiet post-IPO' baseline — the August unlock and the now-explicit reflexive loop are the two things to watch, and this is plausibly the last all-GREEN reading before the August unlock enters the proximity window. VIX has risen 16.41->18.44 alongside the pullback.

spot.price: ~185 intraday 2026-06-19 (prev close 191.82; intraday low ~172.11); ATH ~225.64 on 2026-06-16, ~18% off the high; +~37% over the $135 offer ($135 priced 06-11, ~$161 day-one close 06-12)

runs.driving_observable: Free float is still ~fully locked (lockup clock from the 2026-06-11 prospectus; no tranche released yet), so despite a sharp ~18% pullback from the 06-16 ATH there is no float for a coordinated exit to run on. The AMBER cluster (lockup expiry APPROACHING + turnover rising + sentiment softening) is not yet met: the August float unlock is ~2 months out (not 'approaching'), and the drawdown is the unwind of a low-float debut squeeze (analysts attribute the debut run to locked-up shares + absent short interest) rather than a holder run. Last likely all-GREEN reading before the August unlock enters the watch window.

observables.next_lockup_expiry_date: August 2026 float unlock reported in press as the concrete next event; ~December 2026 180-day insider lockup expiry (clock from 2026-06-11 prospectus). Confirm exact dates/sizes from the filing.
observables.next_lockup_expiry_size_pct: Conditional 10% bonus tranche releases at the Q2-earnings window ONLY if SPCX closes >=$175.50 (>=30% over offer) on >=5 of the 10 trading days into that date; otherwise rolls into later time-based tranches. August unlock size unquantified (null) pending filing.
observables.holder_concentration: Debut run skewed by locked-up shares + absent short interest (analyst commentary); the tight float amplified both the spike to $225.64 and the subsequent ~18% pullback.
observables.etf_passive_inclusion_status: Newly listed; not yet index-eligible. Future inclusion would change the holder base abruptly.

runs.next_escalation_trigger: Re-rate to AMBER as the August float unlock enters ~30-day proximity with softening sentiment / rising turnover, or on a break back toward the $135 offer on heavy volume. The conditional $175.50 threshold for the 10% bonus tranche is a live marker — price is currently near it.

fire_sales.driving_observable: Price ~$185 is ~18% off the $225.64 ATH but still ~+37% over the $135 offer, so stock-settled obligations remain covered with headroom. The now-CONFIRMED ~$60B Cursor deal is all-stock at fixed consideration, which places price risk on the target's holders rather than creating an SPCX downside trigger (absent collar/earnout/termination terms — pull from the merger filing). NOTE: trigger levels remain unquantified (null) -- GREEN is inferred from price-above-offer, not from known triggers; lower confidence than runs/interconnections. The drawdown has eroded some headroom now that a $60B stock obligation has crystallized.

observables.cursor_acq_stock_component: CONFIRMED 2026-06-16: ~$60B ALL-STOCK acquisition of Anysphere (Cursor), consideration in SPCX Class A stock. All-stock/fixed-exchange structure shifts price risk to Cursor holders; confirm any collar / earnout / termination / deferred-service / stock-settled fee terms from the merger filing.
observables.valor_equipment_lease_exposure: Valor-linked compute SPV ~$20B (~$7.5B equity + ~$12.5B debt) to acquire Nvidia chips, with an xAI/SPCX option to acquire the hardware at lease end; Nvidia ~$2B equity into the SPV (risk shifted toward Valor).
observables.counterparties_holding_spcx_as_asset: Cursor/Anysphere shareholders now receive SPCX Class A stock (all-stock deal); Valor SPV; vendor/acquisition counterparties — full map pending filings.

fire_sales.next_escalation_trigger: Price approaching the nearest stock-settled-obligation / margin / collar trigger (still unquantified — pull from the Cursor merger filing and any margin/pledge disclosures); a sustained slide toward the $135 offer.

interconnections.driving_observable: Counterparty web is intact and densening, with no node under visible stress (Cursor deal closed favorably; Colossus expanding toward 'Colossus 2'). But the reflexive stock-as-currency loop is now EXPLICIT and exercised: SPCX used its post-IPO stock to fund the ~$60B Cursor deal, so an SPCX price decline now directly impairs M&A currency alongside the compute-revenue/sentiment loop. The ~18% pullback from the ATH is a mild down-tick in that loop, not node stress. AMBER requires stress at a node — none present. Highest latent fragility of the three; watch the reflexive loop closely.

observables.counterparty_web_status: Densening: xAI (absorbed subsidiary), Anthropic (compute customer at Colossus/Memphis, ~220k Nvidia GPUs / ~300MW), Valor (~$20B compute-SPV lessor), Cursor/Anysphere (acquisition CONFIRMED 2026-06-16, all-stock). Nvidia supplying the Colossus 2 expansion.
observables.compute_revenue_dependency: Neocloud revenue depends on AI-sector demand driven by the same sentiment cycle pricing SPCX — reflexive loop, now also feeding M&A: stock was used as acquisition currency for Cursor.
observables.ipo_pipeline_status: TD-frontier pipeline reportedly watching (OpenAI/Anthropic); SPCX framed as door-opener.

interconnections.next_escalation_trigger: Stress at a node (AI-capex slowdown, IPO-pipeline failure, Cursor-integration setback) while the reflexive compute-revenue/sentiment loop turns negative; a sustained SPCX decline impairing stock-as-acquisition-currency.

macro_backdrop.vix_trend: Rising: 16.41 (06-16) -> 18.44 (06-17), coincident with the SPCX pullback from its ATH.
